name: dependency_embedding_and_vector
outcome_goal: Prove the embedding runtime contract is explicit and the vector-store adapter owns pgvector details, then remove any stale runtime assumptions about model handling or vector literal formatting.
anti_requirements: Do not make embeddings lifecycle authority.
Do not leak pgvector casts, literals, or threshold syntax back into runtime callers.
Do not widen into search-product or discovery UX work.

jobs.label: embedding_runtime_contract
jobs.prompt: Declare one embedding-runtime authority path for model choice, dimensions, refresh policy, and failure handling. The storage adapter must fail closed when the embedder contract disagrees with that authority, and runtime code should stop carrying any leftover vector-formatting responsibility.

jobs.label: vector_store_adapter_boundary
jobs.prompt: Keep runtime callers on the adapter surface. Runtime code may ask for semantic retrieval, but it should not need to know pgvector syntax, literal formatting, or backend-specific threshold behavior to stay correct.
